overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character walking through a neon-lit city. The journey progresses from an open street into a covered pedestrian walkway with vendors, then emerges into an open plaza overlooking a lower garden level. The environment features towering glass buildings, holographic advertisements, and scattered pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a concrete planter on a futuristic city street. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, approaching a covered pedestrian walkway. Glass towers rise in the background while parked cars line the street. The environment is open with partial sky visibility.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered pedestrian walkway sheltered by an overhead concrete structure. Food vendor stalls line the right side while pedestrians walk in the same direction. The lighting is mixed with artificial neon and filtered natural light. Trash bags and urban debris are visible near the stalls as the walkway approaches an exit to an open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza overlooking lower garden level with holographic displays

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with green holographic display
pedestrians running past suggesting commotion or urgency
turning toward stairs and yellow-trimmed building

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza overlooking lower garden level, turning toward stairs and main building entrance

group of pedestrians visible on lower garden level

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic projection displaying abstract imagery
sunken garden area with palm trees and vegetation visible below railing
metal railings along the edge of the overlook
large building with distinctive yellow horizontal trim and hotel signage

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a wide open plaza with full sky visibility. A prominent green holographic display glows on the right. The path follows an overlook with metal railings, providing views of a lower garden level with lush vegetation. Pedestrians run past in a hurry as the camera turns toward a large building with yellow trim and hotel signage, approaching outdoor stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open futuristic street through a sheltered urban corridor and into a wide, elevated plaza. It begins beside a concrete planter on a city sidewalk, moving forward past parked cars and towering glass buildings toward a covered pedestrian walkway. As the camera enters the shelter of the overhead concrete structure, the environment shifts to a denser urban space lined with food vendor stalls, neon lighting, and scattered debris. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the walkway into a bright plaza, passing a glowing green holographic display and metal railings that overlook a lush lower garden. Finally, the camera glides past hurrying pedestrians and turns toward a large building with yellow trim and hotel signage, approaching a set of outdoor stairs.
